Bathrooms

Bathrooms designed for calm, waterproofed and finished with measured detail.

Bathrooms are delivered as part of a quieter full bathroom renovations, kitchen installation and refurbishment, large-format tiling, carpentry, wall systems and flooring installation studio scope, where planning, waterproofing, tiling and finish control stay aligned from the first survey to handover.

Manchester North West - Lancashire Plan | Design | Craft

Studio Scope

A bathroom service built around detail control.

The bathroom line is delivered as one service inside that joined-up studio offer, so survey planning, waterproofing, tile setting, carpentry support and final detailing stay tightly coordinated.

  • Survey-led planning before demolition and first-fix.
  • Feature tile layouts and stone-led finish palettes.
  • Integrated carpentry and storage where the brief demands it.
  • Clean handover standards with no rushed final detailing.

Studio Method

How the studio keeps this scope premium.

01

Layout discipline

Circulation, shower zones and storage are resolved before wet-zone work starts.

02

Material control

Every tile, trim and brass finish is coordinated for one visual language.

03

Craft execution

Setting out, waterproofing and finish alignment stay under close supervision.

Selected Project

Didsbury ensuite rebuild

A compact ensuite upgraded into a darker, richer composition with aligned tile cuts, bespoke joinery and a controlled stone palette.

10-14 day programme Stone and brass palette Bespoke storage detailing

Finish Language

Material references for this service line.

FAQ

Questions homeowners ask before the brief is shaped.

Do you handle full strip-out bathroom projects?

Yes. We manage strip-out, preparation, waterproofing, installation and final finishing as one controlled sequence.

Can you help refine the material palette?

Yes. Stone tone, metal finish and tile format decisions are part of the design phase, not an afterthought.

What budget range suits this service?

Most premium bathroom briefs sit between GBP 8,000 and GBP 20,000 depending on layout change, materials and bespoke detailing.

Studio Contact

Discuss bathrooms directly with the studio.

Bathroom enquiries move through the same direct studio contact route, so early decisions stay precise and the brief stays measured from the start.

Private Consultation

Start your bathroom brief with a private consultation.

Tell us the rooms involved, the finish ambition and the timing you are aiming for. The studio replies with a measured next step rather than a generic sales response.
